health.message: OKN's social presence is growing well across key metrics.

recommendations.message: On Instagram, your best content type is 'Short Video' with 17.8% avg engagement (19 posts). Create more of this.
On TikTok, your best content type is 'Short Video' with 9.7% avg engagement (15 posts). Create more of this.
Your best posting hour is 16:00 KST (based on 11 posts). Schedule high-priority content around this time.
TikTok reach is declining. Consider boosting posting frequency or trying new content formats on this platform.
Viral content on Instagram: Short Video, Image, Carousel. Create more content in these formats.
Viral content on TikTok: Short Video. Create more content in these formats.
Best performing day is Saturday. Consider making this your primary posting day.
Comments-to-likes ratio is low. Try asking questions, running polls, or creating discussion-worthy content.
Instagram is outperforming industry benchmark by 14.6%! Keep up the great work.
TikTok is outperforming industry benchmark by 7.2%! Keep up the great work.
Instagram reach is growing! Keep up the momentum.
Note: Instagram engagement rate uses reach as denominator; TikTok uses views. Direct rate comparison between platforms should be interpreted with this in mind.
